title: mentha × genevensis
intro: Mentha × genevensis, also known as Geneva mint, is a hybrid mint plant resulting from the cross between Mentha aquatica and Mentha × smithiana. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mentha × genevensis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Mentha × genevensis is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
